title: Bambwood
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bambwood''' was a jungle [[Plant/Legends|plant]] indigenous to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. There was a hedge of bambwood in front of the [[lecture hall]] at the end of the [[Crooked Way]] in the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]].<ref name="DN III">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
